project_area: Sustainable agriculture practices including reducing operating expenses, improving soil and water quality, and minimizing off-farm input purchases
eligibility_summary: Open to Pennsylvania-based farmers, agricultural businesses, non-profits, and government entities. Projects must focus on sustainable agriculture practices such as reducing operating expenses through ecologically beneficial practices, improving soil and water quality, and reducing reliance on off-farm inputs like chemical fertilizers and pesticides. Grants may not exceed $25,000, with an additional $25,000 available if matched dollar-for-dollar, totaling up to $50,000 per calendar year.
